description: Environment setup - install dependencies, run existing build and test suite, confirm baseline is green.
steps: Run `npm install` in the project root
Run `npx prisma generate` to generate Prisma client (uses fake DB URL for build)
Run `npm run test` to confirm all 286 tests pass
Run `npm run build` to confirm the Next.js production build succeeds
acceptance_criteria: `npm run test` passes all existing tests with zero failures
findings: All 286 tests pass. Next.js build succeeds (19 static pages generated). npm install added 51 packages (564 total). 5 npm audit vulnerabilities (1 moderate, 4 high) but not blocking. Prisma client v5.22.0 generated successfully.
